surges.name: Abrasion
surges.summary: Alters friction on surfaces. Base surge: spend 1+ Investiture (touch, free hand) to infuse an object or surface within reach — up to your surge size, not characters or Invested/infused objects — making it nearly frictionless (1 Investiture/round). Or infuse yourself (any size) to gain Skate (spend 2 focus to Move as a free action in a straight line) and Slide (count one size smaller when squeezing; advantage to escape friction/pressure restraints). Others interacting with a slicked surface must win Agility vs. your Abrasion or fall Prone / drop the object; unwilling characters' gear requires an Abrasion test vs. their Physical defense.

talents.name: Frictionless Motion
talents.summary: While infused with Abrasion, your movement rate increases by 10 feet and you ignore Slowed from difficult terrain, climbing, crawling, and swimming.

talents.name: Graceful Skating
talents.summary: When you Skate, you aren't restricted to moving in a straight line.

talents.name: Slippery Target
talents.summary: While infused with Abrasion, attacks can't graze you and Reactive Strikes against you gain a disadvantage.

talents.name: Slick Combatant
talents.summary: While infused with Abrasion, you may interrupt a Move to use other actions, then finish the remaining movement. Once per round, a melee weapon attack made mid-Move rolls an extra damage die (d4, growing with your Abrasion ranks); if you do, the GM may spend a Complication to knock you Prone and end the Move.

talents.name: Reverse Abrasion
talents.summary: Your Abrasion infusions can increase friction instead: characters gain an advantage on Agility and Athletics tests to interact with the target and ignore Slowed the surface would impose.

talents.name: Stormlight Reclamation
talents.summary: After your infusions expend Investiture at the start of your turn, end any number of infusions within reach and recover the Investiture remaining in them.

talents.name: Distant Surgebinding
talents.summary: Use your surges and their talents as though your reach were 20 feet, without needing to touch the target.

talents.name: Smooth Operator
talents.summary: While you have at least 1 Investiture, you gain the benefits of being infused with Abrasion without spending Investiture, and Skate costs 1 less focus.

surges.name: Adhesion
surges.summary: Binds things together via Full Lashings. Base surge: spend 1+ Investiture (touch, free hand) to stick two unsecured objects within reach and within 5 feet of each other (each up to your surge size; one may instead be a floor/wall/ceiling of any size). Costs 1 Investiture/round. Can't target characters or Invested/infused objects; unwilling characters' gear requires an Adhesion test vs. their Physical defense. Breaking a Lashing takes an Athletics test opposed by your Adhesion. (Bondsmiths also wield this surge, but aren't playable.)

talents.name: Binding Strike
talents.summary: After you hit with a melee attack, spend 1 action or 2 focus to use Adhesion without an action: one target must be an object the struck character holds or wears (the infusion test auto-succeeds), and the paired object/surface within 5 feet needs no touch or free hand.

talents.name: Binding Shot
talents.summary: Binding Strike also works when you hit with a ranged attack at any distance, without touching the targets or having a hand free.

talents.name: Adhesive Trap
talents.summary: Infuse just a portion of one surface (up to your surge size). Any character touching that area — on infusion, while moving through it, or when forced into it — is automatically Fully Lashed to the surface for the infusion's duration.

talents.name: Stormlight Reclamation
talents.summary: After your infusions expend Investiture at the start of your turn, end any number of infusions within reach and recover the Investiture remaining in them.

talents.name: Distant Surgebinding
talents.summary: Use your surges and their talents as though your reach were 20 feet, without touching the target (adhered objects must still be within 5 feet of each other).

talents.name: Extended Adhesion
talents.summary: Full Lashings expend 1 Investiture per number of rounds equal to your Adhesion ranks, instead of every round.

talents.name: Living Adhesion
talents.summary: You may target characters directly with Adhesion (tested like targeting their possessions). A character Lashed to something larger than them is Restrained, takes a disadvantage on physical tests, and attacks against them gain an advantage.

talents.name: Superior Bond
talents.summary: When a character with Strength no higher than your Adhesion ranks tries to break one of your Full Lashings, you win the opposed test automatically.

surges.name: Cohesion
surges.summary: Stoneshaping — softens matter at the axi level. Base surge: infuse 1+ Investiture (touch, free hand) into unattended stone within reach (up to your surge size) to make it moldable like clay (1 Investiture/round); rough shaping is immediate, intricate work takes Interact actions or Cohesion tests. Can't target characters or Invested/infused objects; surfaces bearing an unwilling character require a Cohesion test vs. their Physical defense. When the infusion ends the stone resolidifies — anything caught inside is Immobilized (possibly Restrained) until freed via Athletics opposed by your Cohesion.

talents.name: Stone Spear
talents.summary: Spend 1 Investiture: ranged Cohesion attack vs. Physical defense of a target within 60 feet, rolling 2d4 impact damage.

talents.name: Sinkhole
talents.summary: Spend 1 Investiture; choose a stone-ground area up to your surge size and characters touching it. One Cohesion test vs. each target's Cognitive defense; each success sinks that target into the ground, Immobilized.

talents.name: Tunneling
talents.summary: Spend 1 Investiture to infuse yourself: move through stone as if through difficult terrain, leaving a 5-foot tunnel others can follow; maintain for 1 Investiture at the start of each turn.

talents.name: Memories of Stone
talents.summary: Spend 1 Investiture to commune for 1 round with stone you're touching, receiving cryptic images and whispers of the area's history; interpretation may require a Cohesion test (GM's DC).

talents.name: True Stoneshaping
talents.summary: Shape infused stone intricately and extensively without spending additional actions or time.

talents.name: Flowing Earth
talents.summary: After using Cohesion or spending at least 1 action on its talents, the stone underfoot pushes you up to 5 feet × your Cohesion ranks in any direction (including upward on a pillar) without extra Investiture; this movement doesn't trigger Reactive Strikes.

talents.name: Through the Stone
talents.summary: Use your surges and their talents as though your reach were 20 feet.

talents.name: Unbound Cohesion
talents.summary: Use Cohesion on any solid material that isn't alive, Invested, or infused with Stormlight — not just stone.
